name: AWS Resources MCP Server
description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server implementation that provides running generated python code to query any AWS resources through boto3.

tools.name: aws_resources_query_or_modify
tools.description: Execute a boto3 code snippet to query or modify AWS resources

code_snippet.description: Python code using boto3 to query AWS resources

resources.name: aws://query_resources
resources.description: A dynamic resource that provides access to AWS resources through boto3 queries
